epigraph.quote: The garden to Snowshill Manor is the most lovely I've seen, on the side of a hill, compartments.

moments.quote: Very fancy B&B, so posh Simon had to repark the van. Old vine in the conservatory.

moments.place: Folly Farm Campsite, near Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, UK
moments.quote: we're parked under beautiful apple blossom
